summary: Excel export features testing complete. All 3 export features (Members, Payments, Attendance) are working correctly. Backend API tests pass (13/13). UI tests confirm export buttons are visible for admin and hidden for non-admin users. File downloads trigger correctly with proper filenames.

tests: Returns valid XLSX file with correct Content-Type header
Export button visible on Members page for admin
Export button hidden for non-admin users
Returns valid XLSX file with correct Content-Type header
Export button visible on Payments page for admin
Export button hidden for non-admin users
Export button visible on Attendance page for admin
Export button hidden for non-admin users

critical_code_review_comments: Members export endpoint correctly uses openpyxl for XLSX generation with proper styling
Payments export endpoint includes comprehensive filtering options (status, type, date ranges, search)
Attendance export is client-side CSV generation (not server-side XLSX) - this is intentional per requirements
All export endpoints properly check admin permissions using get_permission_checker()
Frontend correctly hides export buttons for non-admin users using isAdmin from PermissionsContext
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel export features fully tested and working. Members and Payments export generate XLSX files via backend API. Attendance export generates CSV client-side. All exports are admin-only. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_export_features.py for regression testing.
